isi.lyrics:
Lyric ENHYPEN - Bad Desire (With or Without You) (English Ver.)

Romanization

With or without you
With or without you

What if I told ya that I want ya
But I see your heart is pure
What if I told ya I’m a monster
Don’t come closer

Innocent girl, don’t touch, don’t do it
Don’t wanna take your golden light
Out in the world, you’re just an angel
But here in the dark, my sacrifice

With or without you
Yeah, I’m torn between a deeper desire
With or without you
There’s a flame and baby, it’s getting brighter
Yeah, you got that

Oh oh
With or without you
I belong here in the beautiful fire
It’s all my bad desire

I got desires, baby girl you got desires too
Wanna write my name up on your skin permanent like a tattoo
You pull me close and say forever, ain’t enough for you

Innocent girl, don’t touch, don’t do it
Don’t wanna take your golden light
Out in the world, you’re just an angel
But here in the dark, my sacrifice

With or without you
Yeah, I’m torn between a deeper desire
With or without you
There’s a flame and baby, it’s getting brighter
Yeah, you got that

Oh oh
With or without you
I belong here in the beautiful fire
It’s all my bad desire

Tell me
All your
Deepest
All your bad desires

Tell me
All your
Deepest
All your bad desires

Oh oh
With or without you
I belong here in the beautiful fire
It’s all my bad desire

With or without you
With or without you

Don’t come closer

Yeah, you got that

Oh oh

It’s all my bad desire

Out in the world, you’re just an angel
But here in the dark, my sacrifice

With or without you
Yeah, I’m torn between a deeper desire

Yeah, you got that

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ENHYPEN - Too Close

Romanization

Too close
neomu witaeroun distance
You so bad I gotta move back
neomu tami na I’m so into you

ireoga iseongeul like a monster
Poker face dwieseon rollercoaster
neomchildeuthan feelin’
365 I need you

Pretty smile cheonjinhan neoui numbit
dalkomhan ne hyanggi that’s a hat trick
iseong ttawin meolli
naraga beorijana

nae du nuneul gamabwado
mak eongnureun bonneungdeuri
hanggyee dadara

Too close
neomu witaeroun distance
You so bad I gotta move back
neomu tami na I’m so into you

Too close
on singgyeongi nogeul distance
sare daaoneun your breath
eojireowo nan I’m so into you


tumyeonghan numbiche nal damgoseon
siseoneul pihaedo soyongeopdae
geureolsurok nan deo
sarajyeo ganeun patience

nal taeyeonhi jageukhae neon
mak jamjaeun yongmangdeuri
kkaeeonal geot gata

Too close
neomu witaeroun distance
You so bad I gotta move back
neomu tami na I’m so into you

Too close
on singgyeongi nogeul distance
sare daaoneun your breath
eojireowo nan I’m so into you

Baby I can’t help it
Too close
modeun gamgagi neol hyanghae
sasil neoboda deo wonhae
deo mot chama nan I’m so into you

Hangeul

Too close
너무 위태로운 distance
You so bad I gotta move back
너무 탐이 나 I’m so into you

잃어가 이성을 like a monster
Poker face 뒤에선 rollercoaster
넘칠듯한 feelin’
365 I need you

Pretty smile 천진한 너의 눈빛
달콤한 네 향기 that’s a hat trick
이성 따윈 멀리
날아가 버리잖아

내 두 눈을 감아봐도
막 억누른 본능들이
한계에 다다라

Too close
너무 위태로운 distance
You so bad I gotta move back
너무 탐이 나 I’m so into you

Too close
온 신경이 녹을 distance
살에 닿아오는 your breath
어지러워 난 I’m so into you


투명한 눈빛에 날 담고선
시선을 피해도 소용없대
그럴수록 난 더
사라져 가는 patience

날 태연히 자극해 넌
막 잠재운 욕망들이
깨어날 것 같아

Too close
너무 위태로운 distance
You so bad I gotta move back
너무 탐이 나 I’m so into you

Too close

살에 닿아오는 your breath
어지러워 난 I’m so into you

Too close
모든 감각이 널 향해
사실 너보다 더 원해
더 못 참아 난 I’m so into you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric ENHYPEN - Helium

Romanization

neoneun naui sumija
saragage haneun air
gadeuk deurikyeo
Your love is helium

neoreul sum swil ttaemada
ajjilhage naraga
gyesok deurikyeo
Your love is helium
Helium

jinggong gatdeon sesang wi natanan jilli
pokbalhadeut dwijiphin nae segyereul bwa

nega chajajun useumeun nal nagwone deryeoga
uju sok romantic
seolmyeong mot hal magic
Without you my heart is in the clouds

Fuel my love i sunggan
dulmanui segyeya
Breathe you in and now I’m alive

neoneun naui sumija
saragage haneun air
gadeuk deurikyeo
Your love is helium

neoreul sum swil ttaemada
ajjilhage naraga
gyesok deurikyeo
Your love is helium
Helium

kkeutdo eopsi chisonneun nae ondo
daechaek eomneun sokdo incredible
bon jeok eopdeon wiheomhan chemicals, chemicals
You got me feelin’

mujilseohan nae papyeondeurui jogakdo
neoreul mannan sunggan bomb jeombu bomb, bomb
i sarangeun first and the last
neoro gadeukhan nae hyeolgwaneun danger now
I can’t take this out

Fuel my love i sunggan
dulmanui segyeya
Breathe you in and now I’m alive

neoneun naui sumija
saragage haneun air
gadeuk deurikyeo
Your love is helium

neoreul sum swil ttaemada
ajjilhage naraga
gyesok deurikyeo
Your love is helium
Helium

Don’t stop i sesang kkeute uri
chosinseongi pokbalhadeut ije nae mameun let’s rock
deo gipi neoreul breathe in
Love’s too hot and we can’t control it, it’s a

Don’t stop i sesang kkeute uri
Closest to the heaven ije nae mameun let’s rock
tto gipge neoreul breathe in
Love’s too hot and we can’t control it

neoneun naui sumija
saragage haneun air
gadeuk deurikyeo
Your love is helium

neoreul sum swil ttaemada
ajjilhage naraga
gyesok deurikyeo
Your love is helium
Helium

Oh your love is helium
Helium
Oh keep it up
Your love is helium
Helium


Hangeul

너는 나의 숨이자
살아가게 하는 air
가득 들이켜
Your love is helium

너를 숨 쉴 때마다
아찔하게 날아가
계속 들이켜
Your love is helium
Helium

진공 같던 세상 위 나타난 진리
폭발하듯 뒤집힌 내 세계를 봐

네가 찾아준 웃음은 날 낙원에 데려가
우주 속 romantic
설명 못 할 magic
Without you my heart is in the clouds

Fuel my love 이 순간
둘만의 세계야
Breathe you in and now I’m alive

너는 나의 숨이자
살아가게 하는 air
가득 들이켜
Your love is helium

너를 숨 쉴 때마다
아찔하게 날아가
계속 들이켜
Your love is helium
Helium

끝도 없이 치솟는 내 온도
대책 없는 속도 incredible
본 적 없던 위험한 chemicals, chemicals
You got me feelin’

무질서한 내 파편들의 조각도
너를 만난 순간 bomb 전부 bomb, bomb
이 사랑은 first and the last
너로 가득한 내 혈관은 danger now
I can’t take this out

Fuel my love 이 순간
둘만의 세계야
Breathe you in and now I’m alive

너는 나의 숨이자
살아가게 하는 air
가득 들이켜
Your love is helium

너를 숨 쉴 때마다
아찔하게 날아가
계속 들이켜
Your love is helium
Helium

Don’t stop 이 세상 끝에 우리
초신성이 폭발하듯 이제 내 맘은 let’s rock
더 깊이 너를 breathe in
Love’s too hot and we can’t control it, it’s a

Don’t stop 이 세상 끝에 우리
Closest to the heaven 이제 내 맘은 let’s rock
또 깊게 너를 breathe in
Love’s too hot and we can’t control it

너는 나의 숨이자
살아가게 하는 air
가득 들이켜
Your love is helium

너를 숨 쉴 때마다
아찔하게 날아가
계속 들이켜
Your love is helium
Helium

Oh your love is helium
Helium
Oh keep it up
Your love is helium
Helium
